ham: Dear resident, this is a reminder that society maintenance charges of ₹1500 are due on 15th. Kindly pay via UPI or at the office. Thank you!
spam: Hello! Thiz is from your bank. Your credit card limit has been increased to ₹2,00,000. To confirm, reply YES or click <URL>. Offer valid till 31st. Urgently respond! Kripya jaldi reply kare.
